code:
import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
mut evens = "evens="
mut odds = "odds="
mut first_even = true
mut first_odd = true
mut i = 0
while i < tokens.len()
  let tok = tokens.get(i)
  match tok
  when Some(t)
    let parsed = string.parse_int(t)
    match parsed
    when Some(n)
      if n % 2 == 0
        if first_even
          evens = "#{evens}#{t}"
          first_even = false
        else
          evens = "#{evens} #{t}"
        end
      else
        if first_odd
          odds = "#{odds}#{t}"
          first_odd = false
        else
          odds = "#{odds} #{t}"
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println(evens)
println(odds)
